intended_use: The Swoop Portable MR Imaging System (V2) is a portable, ultra-low field magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic ex
intended_use_full: The Swoop Portable MR Imaging System (V2) is a portable, ultra-low field magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical. When interpreted by a trained physician, these images provide information that can be useful in determining a diagnosis.
target_condition: Internal head structures requiring diagnostic imaging where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical
ground_truth: Reference-based metrics using ground truth target images (Swoop data, high field images, and synthetic contrast images); Linear Reconstruction used as reference standard for Advanced Reconstruction comparison; American Board of Radiology certified radiologists for image quality and pathology annotation
other_metrics: Normalized Mean Squared Error (NMSE) reduced; Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) improved; Contrast-to-Noise Ratio (CNR) greater than or equal to Linear Reconstruction for both hyper- and hypo-intense pathologies; Advanced Reconstruction median score of 2 (most positive rating) across all image quality categories (noise, sharpness, contrast, geometric fidelity, artifact, overall image quality) in radiologist evaluation
